WOD20HM.PlacementHint: Tiles layer: click the scene to place a health monitor tile. Press Esc or pick another tool to cancel.
WOD20HM.ConfigBlurb: Choose a character or NPC whose health track this tile should mirror. Symbols match the sheet: / (bashing), X (lethal), * (aggravated).
WOD20HM.ErrNoCanvas: Canvas is not ready; open a scene first.
WOD20HM.ErrNoPermission: You do not have permission to modify this scene’s tiles.
